⚙ Provider Settings

. 5. Always start with the block, then provide explanation afterwards. 6. For pure conversation (no code changes), respond without the XML envelope. ## Design requirements - Target desktop window (1000×700px minimum). - Use CSS custom properties for theming. - Include hover states, transitions, and keyboard shortcuts. - Handle window resizing gracefully. - Show loading states and user feedback. ${TAURI_APIS} ${projectContext}`; } // ── Chat send ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function onChatKey(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter' && (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey)) { e.preventDefault(); sendMsg(); } } async function sendMsg() { const ta = id('chatInput'); const txt = ta.value.trim(); if (!txt || S.chat.busy) return; ta.value = ''; saveSettings(); addMsg('user', txt); S.chat.messages.push({ role:'user', content: txt }); const msgs = [ { role:'system', content: buildSystemPrompt() }, ...S.chat.messages ]; await generate(msgs); } // ── Generate (streaming LLM call) ──────────────────────────────── async function generate(msgs) { setBusy(true); addMsg('assistant', '', true); let full = ''; try { const p = S.provider; const prov = p.provider; const apiKey = p.apiKey.trim(); const model = id('modelSel').value || p.customModel || p.model; const baseUrl = p.baseUrl.trim() || PROVIDERS[prov]?.url || ''; if (!model) throw new Error('Select a model in ⚙ Settings.'); if (!baseUrl) throw new Error('Enter a base URL in ⚙ Settings.'); if (PROVIDERS[prov]?.needKey && !apiKey) throw new Error('Enter your API key in ⚙ Settings.'); const eventId = Date.now().toString(); if (isTauri && window.__TAURI__.core) { // ── Tauri path: streaming via Rust backend ────────────────── const ul1 = await window.__TAURI__.event.listen(`llm_chunk_${eventId}`, ev => { full += ev.payload; tickStream(ev.payload); }); const ul2 = await window.__TAURI__.event.listen(`llm_done_${eventId}`, ev => { full = ev.payload; }); S.chat.unlisten.push(ul1, ul2); try { await window.__TAURI__.core.invoke('llm_chat_stream', { provider: prov, apiKey, model, messages: msgs, baseUrl, eventId }); } finally { ul1(); ul2(); S.chat.unlisten = S.chat.unlisten.filter(f => f !== ul1 && f !== ul2); } } else { // ── Browser fallback: direct fetch ────────────────────────── full = await fetchStream(prov, apiKey, model, baseUrl, msgs, chunk => { full += chunk; tickStream(chunk); }); } // Parse and apply finaliseStream(full); S.chat.messages.push({ role:'assistant', content: full }); const artifact = parseArtifact(full); if (artifact) { await applyArtifact(artifact); } else { // Fallback: try raw single-HTML detection const rawHtml = extractSingleHtml(full); if (rawHtml) { await applyArtifact({ title:'Generated Page', files:{ 'index.html': rawHtml } }); } } } catch(err) { id('streamMsg')?.remove(); const el = addMsg('assistant', `Error: ${err.message}`); el.classList.add('err'); toast(`❌ ${err.message}`, 'err'); } finally { setBusy(false); } } // ── Browser SSE fetch (fallback) ────────────────────────────────── async function fetchStream(prov, apiKey, model, baseUrl, msgs, onChunk) { const hdrs = { 'Content-Type':'application/json' }; let body; if (prov === 'anthropic') { hdrs['x-api-key'] = apiKey; hdrs['anthropic-version'] = '2023-06-01'; const sys = msgs.find(m => m.role==='system')?.content || ''; const conv = msgs.filter(m => m.role!=='system'); body = { model, messages:conv, system:sys, max_tokens:8192, stream:true }; } else { hdrs['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${apiKey}`; body = { model, messages:msgs, stream:true, max_tokens:8192 }; } const resp = await fetch(baseUrl, { method:'POST', headers:hdrs, body:JSON.stringify(body) }); if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}: ${await resp.text()}`); const reader = resp.body.getReader(); const dec = new TextDecoder(); let buf = '', acc = ''; for (;;) { const { done, value } = await reader.read(); if (done) break; buf += dec.decode(value, { stream:true }); const lines = buf.split('\n'); buf = lines.pop() || ''; for (const line of lines) { if (!line.startsWith('data: ') || line === 'data: [DONE]') continue; try { const j = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)); const piece = prov === 'anthropic' ? j?.delta?.text || '' : j?.choices?.[0]?.delta?.content || ''; if (piece) { acc += piece; onChunk(piece); } } catch(_) {} } } return acc; } // ── Package app ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── async function packageApp() { if (!Object.keys(S.project.files).length) { toast('Generate a project first', 'err'); return; } if (!isTauri) { toast('Packaging requires the Tauri environment', 'err'); return; } setBusy(true); try { await saveAllFiles(); if (!S.project.dir) { // Save to default location await invoke('save_llm_page', { htmlContent: S.project.files['index.html'] || '', projectName: S.project.name }); } toast(`✅ Project saved to:\n${S.project.dir || 'app data/llm-pages/' + S.project.name}\n\nReturn to PakePlus → select this folder as HTML path → Build.`); } catch(e) { toast(`Package failed: ${e}`, 'err'); } finally { setBusy(false); } } // ── Drag handles ────────────────────────────────────────────────── let _hD = false, _hDX = 0, _hDW = 0, _hDEl = null, _hDHandle = null; function startHDrag(e, elId, handleId) { _hD = true; _hDX = e.clientX; _hDEl = id(elId); _hDHandle = id(handleId); _hDW = _hDEl.offsetWidth; _hDHandle.classList.add('on'); document.addEventListener('mousemove', doHDrag); document.addEventListener('mouseup', endHDrag); e.preventDefault(); } function doHDrag(e) { if (!_hD) return; const pId = _hDEl.id; // For sidebar: drag right = bigger, for preview: drag left = bigger const delta = pId === 'previewPanel' ? _hDX - e.clientX : e.clientX - _hDX; const minW = parseInt(getComputedStyle(_hDEl).minWidth) || 130; const maxW = parseInt(getComputedStyle(_hDEl).maxWidth) || 800; const w = Math.max(minW, Math.min(maxW, _hDW + delta)); _hDEl.style.width = w + 'px'; } function endHDrag() { _hD = false; _hDHandle?.classList.remove('on'); document.removeEventListener('mousemove', doHDrag); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', endHDrag); } let _vD = false, _vDY = 0, _vDH = 0; function startVDrag(e) { _vD = true; _vDY = e.clientY; _vDH = id('chatPanel').offsetHeight; id('vDrag').classList.add('on'); document.addEventListener('mousemove', doVDrag); document.addEventListener('mouseup', endVDrag); e.preventDefault(); } function doVDrag(e) { if (!_vD) return; const h = Math.max(60, Math.min(window.innerHeight - 200, _vDH + (_vDY - e.clientY))); id('chatPanel').style.height = h + 'px'; } function endVDrag() { _vD = false; id('vDrag').classList.remove('on'); document.removeEventListener('mousemove', doVDrag); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', endVDrag); } // ── Init ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => { loadSettings(); applySettingsToUI(); setStatus('ready', isTauri ? 'Ready (Tauri)' : 'Ready (browser)'); // Restore last project if any let dir = ''; try { if (isTauri) { const base = await window.__TAURI__.path.appDataDir(); dir = joinP(base, 'llm-pages', S.project.name.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]/g,'-')); await window.__TAURI__.fs.mkdir(dir, { recursive: true }); S.project.dir = dir; // Load existing files const entries = await invoke('read_project_files', { projectDir: dir }); for (const { path, content } of entries) S.project.files[path] = content; if (Object.keys(S.project.files).length) { renderFileTree(); if (S.project.files['index.html']) openFile('index.html'); refreshPreview(); } } } catch(e) { console.warn('init project error', e); } renderFileTree(); renderTabs(); id('chatInput').focus(); addSysMsg(`AI Studio ready · project "${S.project.name}"`); }); // Close settings modal on overlay click id('settingsModal').addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === id('settingsModal')) closeSettings(); });
